items.name: Calpis Soda: Luxurious Mango
items.merchantDescription: Calpis, or more widely known as Calpico, is a unique drink with a light milky taste to is, and Calpis Soda takes that classic flavor to make one memorable soft drink! This limited flavor is made to taste like mangoes! Drink volume: 500 ml

items.name: Fanta: Salty Lychee
items.merchantDescription: Fanta is back with another limited flavor. Perfect for summer, this salty lychee is as refreshing as it sounds! Volume: 490ml

items.name: Mets: Watermelon Soda
items.merchantDescription: Mets is a soda that can be found all over Japan, but this watermelon flavor is only here for the summer!Volume: 480ml

items.name: Giant Pocky: Dream Pocky
items.merchantDescription: Pocky is one of Japan's most popular chocolate snacks! Here we have a giant variety that includes 20 sticks featuring 5 different flavors: chocolate, matcha, melon, strawberry, and grape.

items.name: Cold Stone Creamery: Milky Strawberry Creamy Snacks
items.merchantDescription: We all know Cold Stone for its ice cream, so here's a snack to enjoy that replicates that deliciousness with this creamy strawberry snack!

items.name: Peyoung Yakisoba Fried Potato Chips
items.merchantDescription: Peyoung yakisoba is probably the most well known brand of yakisoba, so here you can enjoy potato chips seasoned to taste like our favorite fried noodles.

items.name: Jagariko: Salty Lemon Bits
items.merchantDescription: Jagariko is a popular potato chip snack shaped like sticks, and here we have a variety with smaller sized sticks and flavored like lemon.

items.name: Mochi Mochi Chocolate: Purple Sweet Potato
items.merchantDescription: These delicious treats mix the luxurious taste of truffle chocolate with the Japanese taste of mochi, combining into these delectable and rich mini bites! On top of it all, this seasonal purple sweet potato flavor, inspired by Okinawan beni imo, is available o

items.name: Karamucho Global: Thai Hot Chili Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Karamucho is a popular spicy potato chip, but with this limited edition you can experience a Japanese take on different flavors from around the world! Here is a hot chili flavored chip inspired by Thailand.

items.name: Tapioca Milk Tea Gummies
items.merchantDescription: Tapioca is the trending flavor of Japan in summer 2019, so to capitalize on the popularity they crafted these gummies made to taste like tapioca milk tea with each bite!

items.name: Mentos: Mix On The Beach
items.merchantDescription: Mentos is a popular candy available all around the world, but Japan of course makes its own flavors, like this one featuring bits with tropical blends like passion fruit mango, banana strawberry, and lemon lime!

items.name: Hi-Chew Premium: Double Melon
items.merchantDescription: Hi-Chew Premium is a higher end kind of the classic candy, and here we have a variety that blends orange Furano melons of Hokkaido, and green Andes melons of Ibaraki.

items.name: Hi-Chew: Kawachi Bankan & Pink Grapefruit
items.merchantDescription: Hi-Chew is a candy everyone knows and loves, and this limited editon features flavors from two citrus fruits: Kawachi bankan and pink grapefruit!

items.name: Pureral Gummy: Pineapple
items.merchantDescription: Pureral gummies are known for its super sweet and luxurious taste. Here we have a limited pineapple flavor - perfect for summer!

items.name: Kajuu Gummy: Shikuwasa
items.merchantDescription: Kajuu gummies are known for their fun shapes modeled after the fruit they taste like. Here we have a limited flavor straight from Okinawa - the lime-like Shikuwasa!

items.name: Pikachu Strawberry Cream Daifuku Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This is a strawberry-flavored cream daifuku featuring Pikachu from Pokemon. Contains 9 pieces.

items.name: I'M Doraemon Milk Pie Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This is a Milk flavored biscuit Omiyage featuring Doraemon and Nobita, which are best friends in the anime series. Contains 10 pieces.

items.name: Hello Kitty Printed Cookies Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This is a cookie Omiyage featuring Hello Kitty's cute pictures on every piece of cookie inside. Contains 15 pieces.

items.name: Hello Kitty X Crayon Shinchan Strawberry Cookies Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This strawberry cream flavored cookies Omiyage features two of the most popular characters in Japan, Hello Kitty and Crayon Shinchan. Contains 6 pieces.

items.name: Gudetama Cream Sandwich Cookies Omiyage
items.merchantDescription: This Omiyage features Gudetama and delicious cream sandwich cookies. Contains 6 pieces.

items.name: Gudetama Milk Manjuu Omiyage
